title: dialium angolense
intro: Dialium angolense, also known as the Angola ironplow tree or African ironwood, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Dialium angolense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antibacterial agent, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
